---
title: "Daniel Conner Lathbury"
---

## Daniel Conner Lathbury

**Dates:** (1831-1922)

### Description

editor of the <i>Guardian</i> 1883-1899

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Oct 19 [1898]](../letters/3386_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from December 3, 1896.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
